# Reference

<!-- DO NOT EDIT: This document was generated by Puppet Strings -->

## Table of Contents

### Classes

* [`zonedit`](#zonedit): install and manage zonedit
* [`zonedit::sshfp`](#zoneditsshfp): manage sshfp records in a zone file.  This class will create a zonefile snippet containing
the sshfp records a specific set of hosts.  The sshfp records can be fetched from puppetdb or provided
as a hash.  If fetched from puppetdb the sshfp records will be fetched from all hosts in puppetdb

### Functions

* [`zonedit::fetch_sshfp`](#zoneditfetch_sshfp): this functions fetches the ssh fact from puppetdb and extracts the SSHFP records

## Classes

### <a name="zonedit"></a>`zonedit`

install and manage zonedit

#### Parameters

The following parameters are available in the `zonedit` class:

* [`git_pub_key`](#git_pub_key)
* [`git_priv_key`](#git_priv_key)
* [`git_user`](#git_user)
* [`zones_repo`](#zones_repo)
* [`zonedit_repo`](#zonedit_repo)
* [`zones_dir`](#zones_dir)

##### <a name="git_pub_key"></a>`git_pub_key`

Data type: `String`

the ssh public key used to interact with git

##### <a name="git_priv_key"></a>`git_priv_key`

Data type: `String`

the ssh private key used to interact with git

##### <a name="git_user"></a>`git_user`

Data type: `String`

the user used to interact with git

Default value: `'dns0ps'`

##### <a name="zones_repo"></a>`zones_repo`

Data type: `String`

zones_repo the repository where zone files are stored

Default value: `'git@git.dns.icann.org:zonedit/zones.git'`

##### <a name="zonedit_repo"></a>`zonedit_repo`

Data type: `String`

zonedit_repo the repository where zone files are stored

Default value: `'git@git.dns.icann.org:dns-eng/zonedit.git'`

##### <a name="zones_dir"></a>`zones_dir`

Data type: `Stdlib::Unixpath`

the directory where the zone files are stored

Default value: `'/var/git_repos/zones'`

### <a name="zoneditsshfp"></a>`zonedit::sshfp`

class { 'zonedit::sshfp':
 zone_file => '/var/named/db.example.com.sshfp',
 parent_zone => 'example.com',
 use_puppetdb => true,
}

#### Parameters

The following parameters are available in the `zonedit::sshfp` class:

* [`zone_file`](#zone_file)
* [`parent_zone`](#parent_zone)
* [`use_puppetdb`](#use_puppetdb)
* [`perform_bump`](#perform_bump)
* [`ttl`](#ttl)
* [`sshfps`](#sshfps)

##### <a name="zone_file"></a>`zone_file`

Data type: `Stdlib::Unixpath`

the zone file to manage

##### <a name="parent_zone"></a>`parent_zone`

Data type: `Stdlib::Fqdn`

the parent zone of the zone file, will have a serial bump when zone_file changes

##### <a name="use_puppetdb"></a>`use_puppetdb`

Data type: `Boolean`

whether to use puppetdb to get the sshfp records

Default value: ``false``

##### <a name="perform_bump"></a>`perform_bump`

Data type: `Boolean`

whether to perform a bump of the parent zone serial when the zone file changes

Default value: ``true``

##### <a name="ttl"></a>`ttl`

Data type: `Integer[1]`

the ttl to use for the sshfp records

Default value: `60`

##### <a name="sshfps"></a>`sshfps`

Data type: `Hash[Stdlib::Fqdn, Array[String[1]]]`

a hash of sshfp records to manage.  theses records are also
included when use_puppetdb is vtrue

Default value: `{}`

## Functions

### <a name="zoneditfetch_sshfp"></a>`zonedit::fetch_sshfp`

Type: Puppet Language

zonedit::fetch_sshfp() == { 'fqdn1' => [ 'record1', 'record2' ], 'fqdn2' => [ 'record1', 'record2' ] }

#### `zonedit::fetch_sshfp()`

zonedit::fetch_sshfp() == { 'fqdn1' => [ 'record1', 'record2' ], 'fqdn2' => [ 'record1', 'record2' ] }

Returns: `Hash[Stdlib::Fqdn, Array[String[1]]]` a hash of SSHFP records in the form of { 'fqdn' => [ 'record1', 'record2', ... ] }
